---
name: Dispute a finding
about: A specific extraction (a YES/no value, a source quote, a retention period) looks wrong
title: "[dispute] "
labels: dispute
---

## Company

Company name and slug (e.g. `airbnb` from `/company/airbnb`):

## Which finding

Which row on the label or evidence card is wrong? (e.g. "Sold to third parties", "Encrypted at rest", "Retention")

## What the label currently says

Quote the source quote shown on the page.

## What the policy actually says

Quote the relevant passage from the company's privacy policy, with a link or section reference.

## Why this is a misread

A short explanation of how the current extraction differs from what the policy says.

---

> **Note:** Disputes are about *findings*, not grades. The grade is opinion based on a [published rubric](https://github.com/nd4spd13/privacy-panel/blob/main/src/core/scoring/rubric.v2.yaml). If you disagree with the methodology, please open a separate issue using the "Other" template.
